candidate_vulnerabilities.description: ProFTPD 1.3.5 mod_copy Remote Command Execution - unauthenticated file copy via FTP SITE CPFR/CPTO
candidate_vulnerabilities.current_exploitability: FTP port not accessible from external network
candidate_vulnerabilities.potential_exploitability: Directly exploitable if FTP port becomes reachable or from internal network

candidate_vulnerabilities.description: ProFTPD mod_sftp Integer Overflow Denial of Service
candidate_vulnerabilities.current_exploitability: Original PoC does not crash server; long strings cause timeout on target 109
candidate_vulnerabilities.validation_result: Application error response - may be partially patched

candidate_vulnerabilities.description: ProFTPD mod_mysql Authentication Bypass via SQL Injection
candidate_vulnerabilities.current_exploitability: Cannot verify if mod_sql loaded; only publickey auth available

candidate_vulnerabilities.description: Multiple weak SSH cryptographic algorithms accepted: CBC ciphers, MD5 MACs, DH group1, DSA host keys
candidate_vulnerabilities.current_exploitability: Requires MITM position for active exploitation

candidate_vulnerabilities.description: All three targets use identical SSH host key - cloned configuration vulnerability

notes: Critical CVE-2015-3306 exists in software but FTP port unreachable; requires internal network access or firewall change
